name: feat-ESE-0021-01
title: TileSet, TileSetSource, TileData types and TileMapLayer
description: Define the core tilemap data types using Godot terminology: TileSet (resource), TileSetSource, TileData (polygon, physics, custom data), TileMapLayer (sparse HashMap of cells), CellData, and Chunk. Coordinate system: (0,0) at lower-left corner, centre of cell (0,0) at (0.5,0.5).
acceptanceCriteria:
- TileSet with TileSetSource containing TileData entries
- TileData has arbitrary polygon (Vec2[] in [0,1] local space)
- TileMapLayer with sparse cell storage
- CellData references source and tile coords
- Chunk type with chunkSize, dirty flag, network/physics versions
- Coordinate helpers: cellToWorld, worldToCell
- Unit tested
demoDeliverable: Terminal output from unit tests showing tileset creation, tile placement, and coordinate conversions.
testingScenarios:
- Create TileSet with multiple tile types
- Place tiles in TileMapLayer, verify sparse storage
- Convert cell coords to world coords and back
- Verify (0,0) cell centre is at (0.5, 0.5) world
stakeholderUnderstanding: Core data types for the tilemap system.
